  "santafe": "data:image/png;base64,",
};

/* 인기차량 렌더 */
function renderPopular() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('popularGrid');
  grid.innerHTML = ALL_CARS.map(c => `
    <div class="prod-card">
      <div class="pc-img">
        <img src="${CAR_IMGS[c.img]}" alt="${c.brand}" loading="lazy">
        <span class="pc-tag ${c.tagC}">${c.tag}</span>
        <div class="pc-btns">
          <button class="pc-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();wish(this)">♡ 찜하기</button>
          <button class="pc-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">🛒 담기</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pc-info">
        <div class="pc-brand">${c.brand}</div>
        <div class="pc-name">${c.name}</div>
        <div class="pc-spec">${c.spec}</div>
        <div><span class="pc-price">${c.price}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

/* ── CHAT LOGIC ── */
let chatState = 0;
let userProfile = { gender:null, age:null, priority:null, type:null };
let chatOpen = false;
let firstOpen = true;

function openChat() {
  document.getElementById('chatPanel').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('backdrop').classList.add('on');
  chatOpen = true;
  if (firstOpen) { firstOpen = false; setTimeout(initChat, 350); }
}

function closeChat() {
  document.getElementById('chatPanel').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('backdrop').classList.remove('on');
  chatOpen = false;
